productDisplayName: Vans Men Grey & Maroon Mid Skool 77 Shoes
description: Maroon and grey, round toed, mid top shoes with central lace fastening Suede upper with synthetic overlays and reinforced overlay at the heel collar, branding at the back and on the tongue Soft inner with a padded mouth, tongue and footbed Rubber mid sole with foxing around the toe box Rubber signature waffle outsole with diamond shaped, scooped out grooves
